messages.content: re write Delegated young people as advocate for robust environmental and social policies
Empowering young people to be advocates for strong environmental and social policies through delegation.
re write Support sustainability driven manufacturers to improve production
Assist manufacturers focused on sustainability in enhancing their production processes.
rewrite Assist manufacturers focused on sustainability in enhancing their production processes.
Help sustainable manufacturers to enhance their production procedures.
rewrite Launched  program to shift the flow of climate finance at the World Bank Annual Meetings held in Washington D.C.
Introduced a program aimed at changing the direction of climate finance during the World Bank Annual Meetings held in Washington D.C.
rewrite Increased media coverage (145 media hits, reaching 275 million people in the US and around the world.
Achieved enhanced media coverage with 145 news stories reaching a total audience of 275 million people in the United States and worldwide.
rewrite Encourage major manufacturers to reduce how much materials are required per product.
Promote the reduction of material usage per product by major manufacturers.
rewrite Education of how to calculate Domestic Material Consumption for companie
Educational initiative on calculating Domestic Material Consumption (DMC) for companies.

rewrite It is referred to as the quantity of hazardous waste generated and treated. Many of these substances have a negative 
impact on people's health and the environment
This refers to the volume of hazardous waste produced and processed, which often has adverse effects on human health and the environment.
Rewrite The World Bank announced it would no longer finance upstream oil and gas infrastructure
The World Bank declared that it will cease to provide financing for oil and gas infrastructure situated upstream.
re write Participated in the inaugural Oceans Summit and Indigenous meetings at the U.N. Headquarters in NYC.
Took part in the initial meetings on Oceans and Indigenous issues at the United Nations (UN) headquarters in New York City.
re write Created awareness on how and why to recycle outdated electronics safely
Raised awareness on the significance of safely recycling obsolete electronics.
rewrite Educate small and medium size companies to cut back on single use plastics.
Train small and medium-sized enterprises to reduce the use of disposable plastics.
